column8: Brown, gravelly silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)
Concrete with Cobbles and Gravels of moderately decomposed granite. (FILL)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely to very narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese, stained, kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees and 40 degrees-60 degrees.

Moderately strong to strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed to slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, moderately narrow to very narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese, stained, kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees and 40 degrees-60 degrees.
